subcodes.first_line: O radiant stars of the horizon of the love of God! Praise be to God that from the rays of the Sun of Truth both East and West are illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نجوم بازغه افق محبت الله الحمد لله از پرتو شمس حقیقت در خاور و باختر
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah
